detaileddescription.para: Instance of the subsystem that created this interface
Map of user IDs representing local users to an array of FOnlineFriend instances
Map of user IDs representing local users to an array of FOnlineBlockedPlayer instances
Constructor that is invoked by the Subsystem instance to create a friend interface instance
Method used by the Identity interface to register delegates for friend notifications to this interface to get real-time updates from the Lobby websocket.
Method used by async tasks to add an array of friends to the friend list
Method used by async tasks to add a single friend to the friends list
Method used by async tasks to remove a single friend from the friends list

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &UserId, const TArray< TSharedPtr< FOnlineBlockedPlayer > > &NewBlockedPlayers)
memberdef.name: AddBlockedPlayersToList

detaileddescription.para: Method used by async tasks to add an array of blocked users to the blocked users list
Method used by async tasks to remove a single blocked user to the blocked users list
Method used by async tasks to remove a single blocked player from the blocked players list

memberdef.name: SendInvite

detaileddescription.para: Starts an async task that sends an invite to another player.

parameterdescription.para: the user that is sending the invite
name of the friends list to invite to. Not yet implemented on AccelByte you can leave it blank
fired when the request is complete

simplesect.para: true if the request was started successfully, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Check on the cached list whether player is blocked

parameterdescription.para: Id of user that made the request

detaileddescription.para: Sync third party platform friend to AccelByte service, this will automatically add the third party friends to AccelByte service if they already linked their account to AccelByte service. The native friend list is retrieved using native OSS.

parameterdescription.para: the user that sending friend sync request
friend list name in native platform
friend list name in AccelByte service (optional)

simplesect.para: true if the request was started successfully, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Sync third party platform friend to AccelByte service, this will make an S2S call to platform of choice to sync friends.

parameterdescription.para: the user that sending friend sync request

simplesect.para: true if the request was started successfully, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Hidden default constructor, the constructor that takes in a subsystem instance should be used instead.
Delegate handler for when another user accepts our friend request
Delegate handler for when we receive a friend request from another user
Delegate handler for when another user removes us as a friend
Delegate handler for when another user rejects our friend request
Delegate handler for when another user cancels their friend request to us

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const TSharedRef< FOnlineUserPresence > &Presence, int32 LocalUserNum)
memberdef.name: OnPresenceReceived

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< TSharedPtr< FOnlineBlockedPlayer > > &OldBlockedPlayersList, const TArray< TSharedPtr< FOnlineBlockedPlayer > > &NewBlockedPlayersList)
memberdef.name: IsBlockedPlayersListChanged

detaileddescription.para: Implementation of the IOnlineFriends interface using AccelByte services.
